title: 10 Things a Man of Faith Should Stop Calling Strength
caption:
Pride doesn't always look loud. Sometimes it looks like competence. Like self-sufficiency. Like the man who has it handled.

Most of the things we call strength in a man are fear with better posture. Not asking for help. Never apologizing. Going dark when things get hard. Staying busy enough that you don't have to feel anything.

A man of God walks humbly. That's not a personality type. It's a posture — "He looks any man in the eye and still gets on his knees."

"God opposes the proud but gives grace to the humble." — James 4:6

Save this for the man who's been confusing distance with dignity.

#faith #humility #christianmen #pride #godlymen #manofgod #scripture #james4 #christianity
